25, there will be great misunderstanding and quarrels with his brother: Law

property will be lost as a result of quarrels. The native will struggle upto
3 I. He will get married between 26-28. He will have five issues. He will
have to eke out his livelihood through a machinery concern. He will live
.upto 66 years of age.
